similar.title: S Janaki death reason: What happened to legendary singer Janaki Amma?
similar.description: Legendary singer S. Janaki, the Nightingale of South India, has passed away. She died at the age of 88 after battling age-related ailments. Janaki had declined the Padma Bhushan award in 2013, feeling it came too late. She won four National Film Awards and thirty-three State Film Awards. Her death marks the end of an era in Indian playback singing.

title: Nearly half of Gujarat students don't reach Class 12: Report
description: Gujarat's education system enrolled over 1.15 crore students in 2025-26. The state recorded a 54.5% retention rate up to Class 12. This rate declined significantly at the secondary level, showing a dropout issue. Gujarat's student-teacher ratio stands at 29, higher than the national average. Several schools reported zero enrollments with multiple teachers present.

title: Dreams don’t expire
description: Some dreams may be set aside, but they never truly disappear. For alternative singer-songwriter Jeno Perey, music was always part of who she was. title: Kota hospital deaths: Om Birla hands Rs 5 lakh aid to kin of deceased
description: Lok Sabha Speaker Om Birla extended financial support by handing over ₹5 lakh checks to the families mourning the loss of five women in Kota, who experienced complications after cesarean deliveries. The children of these bereaved families will benefit from the state's Palanhaar Yojana, receiving vital financial aid. Furthermore, the government pledges long-term socio-economic support, while a thorough investigation looks into the troubling case of potentially tainted oxytocin injections.
